opinion.h4: SKOLNICK v. KERNER, GOVERNOR OF ILLINOIS, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF ILLINOIS. No. 1401, Misc. Decided May 15, 1967.
opinion.p: William G. Clark, Attorney General of Illinois, and Richard A. Michael, Assistant Attorney General, for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
